name: getleverage
description: Community plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: architector
plugins.description: Multi-session architecture exploration workflow — turn raw project ideas into implementation-ready feature briefs

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Tech-agnostic AI development workflow — interview, plan, implement, review, final-check, document, archive. Manual or autonomous via orchestrator-team-lead.

plugins.name: orchestrator-team-lead
plugins.description: Autonomous team-lead that drives the workflow plugin's pipeline over a queue of feature briefs, with isolated fresh-context agents per step and a per-phase token-budget check
